_comment: SENTINEL APEX v102.0 — Feature Flags. All new enterprise features gate here. Set to true to enable.
_v102_notes: STRICT_VALIDATION: when true, items with descriptions < MIN_CONTENT_THRESHOLD chars are rejected
QUEUE_AUTHORITATIVE: when true, items in any queue file are excluded from validated_manifest.json
DASHBOARD_FILTERING: when true, api_layer reads from validated_manifest.json instead of feed_manifest.json
MIN_CONTENT_THRESHOLD: minimum description char length for STRICT mode (50 chars default)
Zero-regression: both queue files are empty → all items pass → no change in displayed count
_v103_apex_gate_flags: ── APEX Gate Flags (all default false — zero regression guarantee) ──
_v103_apex_notes: APEX_MODULE_*: enable/disable individual intelligence modules (all true by default)
APEX_MAX_ITEMS: maximum items to process per pipeline run (2000 default)
ENABLE_APEX_VALIDATION: when true, activates APEX quality gates in intel_validation_gate.py
APEX_REQUIRE_EVIDENCE_GATE: when true, rejects items with LOW evidence reliability
APEX_REQUIRE_CONFIDENCE_GATE: when true, rejects items with LOW detection confidence
APEX_REQUIRE_SOC_GATE: when true, rejects items missing SOC context block
APEX_MIN_EVIDENCE_SCORE: minimum raw evidence confidence score threshold (0 = disabled)
Zero-regression: all APEX gate flags default false — no behavioral change on existing deployments
_v104_apex_v2_evolution_engine: ── v104.0 APEX v2 Evolution Engine Flags ────────────────────────────
_v104_apex_v2_gate_flags: ── APEX v2 Gate Flags (all default false — zero regression guarantee) ──
_v104_apex_v2_notes: ENABLE_APEX_V2_ENGINE: master switch for scripts/apex_v2_evolution_engine.py (Stage 2.7)
APEX_V2_MODULE_THREAT_PRIORITY: 5-factor composite scoring (KEV+CVSS+exploit_maturity+actor+exposure)
APEX_V2_MODULE_TEMPORAL_INTELLIGENCE: lifecycle staging + urgency decay (EMERGING/PEAK/ACTIVE/DECLINING/HISTORICAL)
APEX_V2_MODULE_FEEDBACK_LEARNING: heuristic reliability scoring + confidence trends + learning signals
APEX_V2_MODULE_AGGREGATION: sector impact + top_critical + trending + declining platform analytics
APEX_V2_MODULE_API_EVOLUTION: generates api/apex_v2/{critical,trending,timeline,priority}.json endpoints
APEX_V2_MODULE_DASHBOARD_PRIORITY: generates api/apex_v2/dashboard_intel.json (top3 + alert banner)
APEX_V2_MODULE_VALIDATION_EXT: per-item gate checks for priority/timeline/feedback blocks
APEX_V2_MAX_ITEMS: max items per pipeline run (2000 default, matches APEX v1)
APEX_V2_TOP_CRITICAL_COUNT: items in critical.json / top_critical aggregation (10 default)
APEX_V2_TOP_TRENDING_COUNT: items in trending.json (10 default)
APEX_V2_TRENDING_WINDOW_DAYS: rolling window for trending calculation (30 days default)
APEX_V2_REQUIRE_PRIORITY_GATE: when true, rejects items with CRITICAL priority but score < APEX_V2_MIN_PRIORITY_SCORE
APEX_V2_REQUIRE_TIMELINE_GATE: when true, rejects items missing threat_timeline block
APEX_V2_REQUIRE_FEEDBACK_GATE: when true, rejects items with LOW intelligence_maturity
APEX_V2_MIN_PRIORITY_SCORE: minimum composite priority score threshold (0 = disabled)
APEX_V2_STRICT_LIFECYCLE: when true, enforces valid lifecycle_stage values
Zero-regression: all APEX v2 gate flags default false — no behavioral change on existing deployments
Pipeline input: data/apex_enriched_manifest.json (APEX v1 output)
Pipeline outputs: data/apex_v2_manifest.json + data/apex_v2_strategic_report.json + api/apex_v2/*.json + data/health/apex_v2_audit.json
